text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 41 

FREE_GENERICS 

LABEL: Plan Offers Free Generic Drugs up to a Maximum Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the Part D plan offers free generic drugs. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: FREE_GENERICS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not applicable 
X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is only available 2008-2010. 

The
